nasb.text: If they hear and serve Him, They will end their days in prosperity And their years in pleasures.

esv.text: If they listen and serve him, they complete their days in prosperity, and their years in pleasantness.

cnv.text: 他們若聽從他、事奉他， 就必幸福地度盡他們的日子， 也必快樂地度過他們的歲月。

ccb.text: 他们若听从、事奉祂， 就可一生幸福，安享天年。
